title: 1.1: Patch includes a test that verifies recipient display when the alias has no display name and is on the default domain (or has no custom domain)
1.2: Patch includes a test that verifies recipient display when the alias has a display name set
1.3: Patch includes a test that verifies recipient display when the alias has a display name and uses a custom domain that also has a default name
1.4: Patch includes a test that verifies recipient display when the alias has no display name and uses a custom domain that has no default name
1.5: Patch includes a test that verifies recipient display when the alias has no display name but uses a custom domain that has a default name
2.1: Places the tests for alias recipient display in the alias utils test file
3.1: All added tests use the pytest framework
3.2: All added tests follow the test_ naming pattern
3.3: All added tests use assert statements for verification
4.1: Tests for recipient display use a user and alias created via the same patterns as existing alias utils tests
